hero.title: Sunset Pulse
hero.subtitle: The Premium Intelligence Layer for North Texas Real Estate
hero.description: Eliminating search fatigue through DNA-level request analysis. Experience a search engine that scales its computational weight to match your ambition.

mls_efficiency.title: Elite Asset Discovery
mls_efficiency.description: Traditional search tools rely on rigid parameters. Jamie analyzes the DNA of your request, utilizing our high-performance PostgreSQL backend to deliver sub-10ms responses from the live MLS grid. See only the properties that align with your strategic goals.

spatial_search.title: Surgical Immersion
spatial_search.description: Static photos hide the truth. Our spatial engine provides architectural transparency, allowing you to visualize property flow, neighborhood context, and structural integrity. Gain the confidence to move on elite assets with dimensional precision, reducing site visits and accelerating your closing path.

backend_integrity.title: Enterprise Reliability
backend_integrity.description: We've bridged the gap between complex engineering and seamless user experience. With a robust Supabase architecture, your preferences remain persistent and your data stays secure across every session.

items.question: How does Jamie analyze my 'Request DNA'?
items.answer: Unlike traditional filters, Jamie uses semantic analysis to understand the intent behind your search. By scaling computational weight to your specific requirements, Jamie cross-references live MLS data with neighborhood socioeconomic metrics to find matches that align with your long-term goals.

items.question: What is the value of 'Spatial Search' over standard lists?
items.answer: Spatial search allows you to define search parameters based on coordinate blocks and neighborhood 'vibes' rather than just zip codes. This identifies hidden opportunities in high-growth corridors that legacy platforms often miss.

items.question: How do I use the 3D Surgical Immersion feature?
items.answer: Within any property profile, you can activate the 3D grid. This provides a dimensional view of the property's flow and structural layout. You can toggle between 'Elite Recon' for architectural detail and 'Neural Hybrid' for technical data overlays like price-per-square-foot heatmaps.

items.question: Is the MLS data really real-time?
items.answer: Yes. Our high-performance PostgreSQL backend synchronizes with the live MLS grid to deliver sub-10ms response times. When a property status changes or a new asset is injected into the market, it appears on your grid instantly.

items.question: How do I save a specific search region?
items.answer: In the Map Explorer, use the polygon tool to draw a custom boundary around your target area. Once defined, you can label the region and save it to your 'Recon Surveillance' list for automated status pings.
